title: P0 Root Synthetic Session State Machine
description: Root session engine state definition for P0-Technical Check. Synthetic-only. NOT the phone-only simulator (see phone-only-simulator/phone-session-state-machine.json). NOT a human-subject protocol. NOT validated mediation behavior.

boundary.note: This state machine operates exclusively on synthetic/mock data. No real participant data enters this engine. Human-subject research (P1-P3) operates outside this repository under separate IRB governance.
boundary.phone_simulator_scope: Phone app UX flow for P4-4 synthetic phone demo
boundary.this_scope: Root synthetic session engine for P0 Technical Check infrastructure

INIT.description: Session initialised. participant_id and condition_id auto-assigned. No human present.

CONSENT.description: Synthetic consent acknowledgement placeholder. In real P1+ studies this maps to actual informed consent under IRB. Here it is a mock gate only.

BASELINE.description: Baseline state capture (T0). Human-State Packet mock generated. SAM/VAS slots initialised with null values.

AI_OUTPUT.description: AI response delivery gate. condition_id determines which of A/B/C/D response type is routed. Timestamp recorded.

DELTA.description: Delta state computation (T1 - T0). ΔState calculated across SAM/VAS/clarity/stability/trust slots. Missing-data auto-detection runs here.

RECOVERY_GATE.description: 5-minute persistence window (T2). Checks whether state improvement from T1 persists. In synthetic mode this is mock-computed from pre-defined decay curves.

TERMINATION.description: Session end gate. Distress-check placeholder (always PASS in synthetic mode). Debrief mock logged. Session marked complete.

CLOSURE.description: Final state. Full audit log sealed. Replay manifest generated. No further transitions permitted.

AUDIT.description: Out-of-band audit state. Can be entered from any non-CLOSURE state for inspection. Does not modify session state.

forbidden_transitions.reason: CLOSURE is a terminal state. No transition out is permitted.
Backward re-measurement not allowed in a single session.
Re-exposure to AI output after recovery gate is not permitted.
AUDIT must return to prior state, not jump to CLOSURE.
